items.summary: Added fail-closed validator checks for reviewer roster size and parity so governed review cannot start with an invalid reviewer set.

Aligned terminal status handling across shared contracts, prompts, types, board runtime branches, and result synthesis; added explicit handling for resume_required and frozen_with_conditions plus final-round ultimatum behavior.
Preserved canonical severities through fix-decision handling, added artifact_refs and fallback provenance to audit/KPI outputs, and protected shared rulebook writes with a file lock.

Repointed live consumers at the shared review, learning, and component-repair engines and added a shared-module loader so agent-role-builder no longer carries separate prompt/runtime copies for those concerns.
Added the missing leader status values to the contract/type/runtime set and implemented explicit board exits for leader-issued resume_required and frozen_with_conditions.
Separated material repair work from cosmetic deferred items so freeze is gated only by blocking and major issues.
Made the shared review engine the canonical source for reviewer and leader prompt construction instead of maintaining diverging local helper copies.
Adopted shared/component-repair-engine as the live repair path by replacing the local repair orchestration in role-generator with a thin adapter over the shared engine.
Plumbed arbitration_used from board rounds into result synthesis and removed silent governance/config fallbacks by logging or failing closed for critical files.
Cycle postmortem artifact presence is now derived from actual file existence checks instead of hardcoded true flags.
